ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "board_symbol" TEXT /* Board symbol representing the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., bond, stock, option) */,
  "issuance_date" TEXT /* Date of issuance for the instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date of maturity for the instrument */,
  "coupon_rate" TEXT /* Rate of coupon payment for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument being adjusted */,
  "factor" INTEGER /* Adjustment factor applied to the instrument */,
  "move_value" INTEGER /* Value indicating the movement in the instrument's market value */,
  "update_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the adjustment has been updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the adjustment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the adjustment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the adjustment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the adjustment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjustment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adjustment entry that was changed */,
  "changed_factor" INTEGER /* Factor value before the change */,
  "changed_move_value" INTEGER /* Move value before the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustment_history_adjustment_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjustment_id") REFERENCES adjustments ("adjustment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user such as analyst, admin, etc. */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for whom permissions apply */,
  "can_update" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can update adjustments */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can view adjustments */,
  "can_create" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can create new adjustments */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can delete adjustments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adjustment that was acted upon */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_adjustment_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjustment_id") REFERENCES adjustments ("adjustment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly, quarterly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status log entry */,
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adjustment being updated */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the update occurred */,
  "old_status" INTEGER /* Status before the update */,
  "new_status" INTEGER /* Status after the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_statuses_adjustment_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjustment_id") REFERENCES adjustments ("adjustment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adjustment related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_adjustment_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjustment_id") REFERENCES adjustments ("adjustment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_instrument_categories" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "category_id")
)
